z#Transform raw data to encoded data.N
3/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/nacl/encoding.py
encode
_Encoder.encodec
Transform encoded data back to raw data.
        Decoding after encoding should be a no-op, i.e. `decode(encode(x)) == x`.
        Nr
